compliance.control: FAR 52.204-21 — Basic Safeguarding of Covered Contractor Information
compliance.note: Baseline safeguards verified across all CUI-tagged Snowflake schemas and Iceberg partitions.
NIST SP 800-171 controls implemented. Last assessment 2026-Q1.

compliance.control: DFARS 252.204-7019 — NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Requirements
compliance.note: SPRS score 104 (high). Self-assessment refreshed monthly via the ODI control plane.
CMMC Level 2 certified 2026-02-14. Re-cert 2029. Iceberg CUI bucket on segregated AWS GovCloud account.
Defense-program data isolated to US-person access. Citizenship attestations enforced at the catalog layer.
Deltek Costpoint indirect-rate streams keep classified vs unclassified program accounting separate by default.

data_handling_note: All defense-program data lands in a CUI-tagged Iceberg namespace on a separate AWS GovCloud account. Commercial-OEM data lands in the public-commercial account. The ODI catalog presents one logical surface, but the storage and access boundary follows FAR/DFARS authority.
